data.title: L3Harris Powers First Crewed Mission Around the Moon in 50 Years
data.description: L3Harris Technologies, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol LHX, has played a crucial role in the Artemis II mission at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida. This mission, which marks a significant milestone in space exploration, represents the first crewed mission to the moon in over half a century. L3Harris provided propulsion and avionics for this historic launch, supporting NASA's Space Launch System rocket and Orion spacecraft. Christopher Kubasik, the Chairman and CEO of L3Harris, expressed congratulations to NASA and all collaborators involved in this groundbreaking endeavor.

data.title: Black Hat Asia 2026: Award-Winning Journalist and Offensive Security CEO Expose Autonomous Cyber Threats with Growing Implications for APAC
data.description: Singapore - Black Hat Asia 2026, a prominent cybersecurity event, has disclosed Violet Blue, an investigative journalist, and Ari Herbert-Voss, CEO of RunSybil, as Keynote speakers. The event will be held on April 23 and 24 at Marina Bay Sands Expo & Convention Centre in Singapore. They will discuss privacy-centric frameworks and self-reliant AI systems, emphasizing their significance in the cybersecurity realm.
A 6.01 magnitude earthquake has hit Brazil, according to GFZ.
Nikkei index in Japan rises above 54,000 yen level.

data.title: INOVIO Announces Proposed Public Offering
data.description: In a press release dated April 1, 2026, INOVIO Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biotechnology firm traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol INO, revealed their dedication to creating and marketing DNA therapeutics to combat HPV-related ailments, cancer, and infectious diseases, based in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania.

data.title: CHIC 2026 Honors Landmark Deals and Financings at Annual Awards Gala
data.description: On April 1, 2026, the 12th Annual China Healthcare Investment Conference (CHIC 2026) concluded its first day at The Ritz-Carlton Hotel Pudong, Shanghai with an Awards Gala Dinner. This event marked the celebration with co-hosts including the Founding Platinum Sponsor.

data.title: GA technologies Rebrands "Renters Warehouse" as "RENOSY by Renters Warehouse" to Accelerate U.S. Growth
data.description: In Tokyo on April 1, 2026, GA technologies Co., Ltd. introduced its AI real estate investment service, "RENOSY." The company's headquarters is located in Minato-ku, Tokyo, with Ryo Higuchi serving as President and CEO. The stock code for GA Technologies is 3491. The initiative to rebrand "RENOSY" has been officially launched.
